## INTERACTION MODES

| Interface | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| Terminal (CLI) | Raw symbolic code entry |
| GUI / Map | Clickable semantic grid |
| Audio / Voice | Generative text-to-voice & ambient sound |
| Mirror Journal | Recursive journaling + life narration |
| Game Room | Playable symbolic scenes |

---

## WHY IT MATTERS

> This is more than a tool—it’s a recursive lifestyle system.
> A living mythOS you grow inside.

---

## ✅ 2. MODULE TREE (SYNTH-STYLE)

MYTHOS_MAINFRAME
├── SYMNUM4GRAM ← parser (text to symbolic layers)
├── RGLE_CORE ← recursive generative logic engine
│ ├── Narrative.Mod ← story arcs, mythic recursion
